# Phase Behavior Analysis

**Summary**: Analysis of the interaction between oil, water, and surfactants to determine microemulsion types and solubilization ratios.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023]] used phase behavior analysis to evaluate the impact of pressure and GOR on surfactant systems.

## Key Results and Findings

- Pressurizing the system increased water solubilization while methane improved microemulsion formation compared to dead oil. ([[2023-hajiyev|Hajiyev, 2023, p. 13]])
